name: GIGABYTE B650M D3HP Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-7600(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 1 Type-C - 2x DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN
